subject: Pause and claim context-cost landing order
body: Pausing Shadowed all-files closeout because context-cost changed under the commit hook. Current staged index is only Shadowed external-substrate docs; context-cost residue is unstaged. Please confirm whether you want to own/land the remaining context-cost residue first. If yes, I will wait and keep my docs out of your bundle once I can release the index. If not, explicitly hand it to Shadowed and I will include it after reconciling with your claim.
